_meta.purpose: Surfaces where length is justified by content density (multi-sub-claim, citation-heavy, kernel-of-truth load-bearing) rather than technical/mathematical content. Sloppytoppy applies target_max × 2.0 length threshold. Distinct from math-dense (which also disables jargon penalty). PROP-039 length-contextual amendment, Option D hybrid. Curated; sloppytoppy may override with audit trail.

schema_version_history.change: Initial seed — 9 surfaces including 8 WIN entries + 1 section block.

Operator policy 2026-05-16: WIN surfaces are NEVER content-dense eligible. Per-WIN debunks must fit within base target_max — if a WIN's detail_evidence can't debunk in <=600 words, the prose is over-engineered (link out to underlying research rather than expand inline). Content-dense flag remains available for higher-level analysis section blocks (predictions / model tabs) where multi-paragraph synthesis is legitimately required. Removed all 8 WIN entries (WIN-013, WIN-014, WIN-006, WIN-048, WIN-067, WIN-068, WIN-053, WIN-010). Retained only part6.html#p6-614-kappa-cluster (SEC-6.14 multi-paragraph defender-pivot synthesis).

_meta.policy_2026_05_16_operator: Content-dense eligibility is NOT extended to per-WIN surfaces. WIN claims should debunk concisely; if depth is needed, replace inline detail with a 1-sentence summary + link to underlying research. Content-dense flag is reserved for section blocks in higher-level tabs (predictions, model, part4-7 deep-analysis sections) where multi-paragraph synthesis is the surface's actual job.
_meta.seed_rationale: Seed based on operator examples in PROP-039 amendment 2 + known-complex citation clusters. Trimmed 2026-05-16 per operator content-dense policy: WIN entries removed; section-block kept. Will grow as sloppytoppy's per-surface override records expose patterns IN SECTION BLOCKS ONLY.

surfaces.rationale: SEC-6.14 kappa-cluster: two-horned forced choice, multi-paragraph defender-pivot walkthrough [Surface ID corrected 2026-05-16: was placeholder kappa-cluster, actual block ID is p6-614-kappa-cluster per sloppytoppy first-run flag-mismatch + Sonnet override identification.]

note: Sloppytoppy can ADD to this list at runtime via the operator-audit mechanism: surfaces where Sonnet applied a length override are surfaced in the run summary. If a SECTION BLOCK gets overridden 3+ times across runs, operator promotes it to this file. WIN surfaces are NEVER promoted to this list (per 2026-05-16 operator policy). Conversely, if a surface here is overridden as 'too verbose' or stops needing the density, operator removes it. Single source of truth for length-multiplier eligibility.
